'''Bataal Bandu''' was a descendant of the early [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]/[[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] cross-breeding experiments who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Part of the [[Sith Order]] who acted against [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], he delighted in spreading the Sith teachings to other cultures.

{{Char-stub}}
